matches.x: N the ninth year of Zedekiah king of Judah, in the tenth month, came Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon and all his: army against Jerusalem,.and they besieged it.

Although Lehi and his family left Jerusalem not long after this, Jerusalem was not besieged by the Babylonians for another nine years, And it came to pass in the ninth year of his reign, in the tenth month, in the tenth day of the month, that Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon came, he and all his army against Jerusalem, and pitched against it, and built forts against it round about. So the city was…
